name: cc
description:
Use Claude Code from Codex to review code or delegate tasks.

Aliases: @cc, @claude, @claude-code, Claude Code, claude code.

Use Claude Code when the user asks to delegate a task to Claude, get a Claude Code code review, or continue work in Claude Code. The plugin wraps the local `claude` CLI in headless mode and exposes review/rescue/transfer/status/result/cancel tools.

interface.shortDescription: Use Claude Code from Codex for reviews and delegation
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Companion lets Codex delegate tasks to Claude Code, run Claude Code code reviews, and hand off sessions. It wraps the locally installed `claude` CLI in headless mode so Codex can call Claude Code as a tool.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review my uncommitted changes
Delegate this bug investigation to Claude Code
